title: Arabic Clean Font (32x)
description: A clean and readable Arabic font for Minecraft, designed to improve clarity and provide a smooth, distraction-free experience.
body:
# **Arabic Clean Font** - Built to improve the Adhkar mod experience


**Arabic Clean Font** is a **Minecraft resource pack** designed to improve A**rabic text readability** with a clean, modern font.
Perfect for players who want better **Arabic support**, clearer UI, and a smoother experience in Minecraft.

##  Why Arabic Clean Font?

Minecraft does not fully support Arabic text rendering. This resource pack helps improve:

- ✔ Arabic font clarity
- ✔ Readability in chat and UI
- ✔ Clean and minimal text appearance
- ✔ Better visual experience for Arabic players


## Installation

Download the resource pack
Move the **.zip** file to:

```
.minecraft/resourcepacks/
```

Open Minecraft

Go to:
```
Options → Resource Packs
```
Enable Arabic Clean Font

## ⚠️Important Notes
- Minecraft does not fully support Arabic shaping (RTL)
- Some text may appear:
    - Separated
    - Reversed
- This is a limitation of the game engine, not the resource pack

## Best Experience Tips
- Use short sentences
- Avoid heavy diacritics (Arabic tashkeel)
